title: UniqueEnchanmentBooks
description: Adds a unique texture for every enchantmented book there is
body:
# UniqueEnchanmentBooks
## Adds unique textures for every enchanted book
### Requires either: 
- Optifine (https://optifine.net/downloads) or 
- CIT Resewn for Fabric (https://modrinth.com/mod/cit-resewn)
